title: Saving: Banks That Are Cash Friendly
body:
Hi all,
I have two banking accounts atm:
CBA: For the past 11 years or so, it is also the one to receive salary and pay bills.
I have gone cash-only for some time now, haven't had problems with it and the ATMs are usually in a working condition.
No credit card, debit card only.
ING: All my savings are there and the main reason was because of the 5.5% for the former Maximiser Saving account.
You are required to use the debit card at least 5x times and deposit $1000 monthly
What concerns me with ING is that there is only one physical agency where I am, so there is no much room for backup.
I have been laid off before, IT is a mess right now, transferring from ING to CBA so you can cash out works but it is single point of failure, if something goes wrong, you are screwed.
I used to have UP before migrating to ING, I moved away from it after spending over 1h listening music unable to speak with nobody, and the chat never worked.
Imagine having problems and you can't speak with your bank??
ING is at least Aussies on the line and in the worst case scenario, there is one agency I can go to.
Thank you for any recommendation.
